properties.title: U.S. and Israel launch 'pre-emptive' strikes on Iran
properties.implication: Sharp escalation into direct state-on-state conflict; sets conditions for retaliation impacting energy flows and regional risk premia.

properties.title: Iran conflict disrupts global shipping as tankers are stranded and damaged
properties.implication: Operational disruption (delays/stranding) reduces effective tanker capacity and tightens prompt supply logistics, reinforcing energy and freight volatility.

properties.title: Iran declares the Strait of Hormuz closed; threatens to fire on ships attempting passage
properties.implication: Raises risk of immediate disruption to a major global oil/LNG chokepoint, embedding an outsized geopolitical supply premium in crude and shipping.

properties.title: Three tankers damaged in the Gulf amid U.S.-Iran conflict escalation
properties.implication: Direct kinetic risk to maritime trade; likely pushes war-risk premia, raises freight, and tightens prompt physical crude availability.

properties.title: Major container lines pause/divert Red Sea and Suez transits after strikes on Iran
properties.implication: Longer routes via Cape of Good Hope extend delivery times and raise global freight costs; inflationary impulse broadens beyond energy.

properties.title: Middle East oil and gas shipping costs surge to record levels
properties.implication: Freight and insurance repricing transmits the shock into refined products and LNG delivered costs, increasing near-term inflation pressure.

properties.title: Saudi Aramco shuts Ras Tanura refinery after drone strike (source)
properties.location_resolved: رحيمة, محافظة رأس تنوره, المنطقة الشرقية, 32811, السعودية
properties.implication: Refinery outage risks product shortages and wider crack spreads; adds to the crude price risk premium if sustained.

properties.title: Qatar LNG output disrupted amid regional strikes
properties.implication: Cuts flexible LNG supply into Europe/Asia, increasing gas price volatility and potential downstream industrial curtailments.

properties.title: Israel temporarily shuts key gas fields as conflict escalates
properties.implication: Reduces regional gas supply and can affect LNG/pipe flows to neighbours; supports higher regional power and gas prices.

properties.title: Iraqi Kurdistan oil output disrupted amid wider regional strikes
properties.location_resolved: Kurdistan Region, Slemani-Dukan Road, کانی خان, Qamchugha, Dokan Central Subdistrict, Dokan District, Sulaymaniyah Governorate, Iraqi Kurdistan Region, 46010, Iraq
properties.implication: Additional supply-side tightening reinforces the global crude risk premium and heightens uncertainty around near-term balances.

properties.title: India reduces gas supply to some industries after Qatar outage (sources)
properties.implication: Shows downstream demand destruction/curtailment risk in LNG-importing economies; negative for growth-sensitive assets.

properties.title: Oil rises as expanding U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran elevates supply risks
properties.location_resolved: Global Oil, Don Alejandro Roces Avenue, Obrero, Diliman, 4th District, Quezon City, Eastern Manila District, Metro Manila, 1103, Philippines
properties.implication: Market pricing reflects higher probability of supply disruption; reinforces inflation concerns and risk-off positioning.

properties.title: Global energy costs surge as Iran crisis disrupts shipping and production
properties.location_resolved: Global Biodiversity Information Facility, Universitetsparken, Nørrebro, Copenhagen, Copenhagen Municipality, Capital Region of Denmark, 2200, Denmark
properties.implication: Higher delivered energy costs can slow growth and lift headline inflation, pressuring equities and widening credit spreads.

properties.title: Netanyahu says war with Iran will not take years as conflict enters fourth day
properties.location_resolved: Iran, German Colony, Downtown District, Haifa, Haifa Subdistrict, Haifa District, 3505526, Israel
properties.implication: Signals intent and duration expectations; markets watch for off-ramps vs. multi-week campaign risk that could deepen supply and shipping impacts.
